comment: hippo48-1m: the milly. base48 + label_loss_w 0.1 (the two probe winners) fed the full 8-shard 1M mint (~925k usable after prune). 16 epochs of fresh-data passes replaces the 40-epoch repetition diet - at 100k both hippo runs still had zero train/val gap, so unique images remain the binding constraint. Cosine LR (built into the loop) stretches over max_epochs automatically. n requests 1M and clamps to whatever survived the audit.
